name: browser-extension-test-data
description: Automated QA testbed: fetches real-world extension samples (MDN, Chrome, Chromium, Edge, Opera, Extension.js) from upstream and verifies Extension.js can build and run them.

scripts.smoke: node scripts/discover.mjs && node scripts/run-matrix.mjs --tier raw --browsers chrome,firefox --limit 12 && node scripts/report.mjs --no-baseline && node scripts/status.mjs
scripts.qa: node scripts/sync.mjs && node scripts/discover.mjs && npm run matrix && node scripts/report.mjs --markdown && node scripts/status.mjs
